name: Uber Technologies, Inc
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. is a technology platform operating in over 70 countries that connects consumers with independent ride service providers (Mobility), restaurants and retailers with delivery couriers (Delivery via Uber Eats), and shippers with carriers in freight logistics (Freight). The platform leverages proprietary marketplace, routing, and payments technologies across more than 15,000 cities worldwide, serving hundreds of millions of drivers, consumers, merchants, shippers, and carriers.

products.name: Uber Mobility
products.description: Connects consumers with ridesharing, carsharing, micromobility, rentals, public transit, taxis, and other transportation modalities.

products.name: Uber Eats
products.description: Delivery app allowing consumers to order from restaurants, grocery, alcohol, convenience, and retail stores for pickup or delivery.

products.name: Uber Direct
products.description: White-label Delivery-as-a-Service offering for retailers and restaurants around the world.

products.name: Uber Freight
products.description: On-demand digital marketplace connecting shippers and carriers for logistics transactions with real-time pricing and shipment tracking.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
